topic: silla de oficina en Cami Fondo

scene_descriptions.clip_258: Theatrical cycling gesture — energetic hook establishing POV and personality
scene_descriptions.clip_672: Dynamic city street cycling with motion blur — building momentum toward discovery
scene_descriptions.clip_674: Black office chair on sidewalk — THE item reveal, cycling POV approach
scene_descriptions.clip_673: Slow-mo person near office chair with green trash can — suspenseful examination, someone almost took it
scene_descriptions.clip_675: Tall building, green sign, parked truck, palm trees — neighborhood context, Cami Fondo streetscape
scene_descriptions.clip_676: Modern building, delivery truck, pedestrian, cycling away — price reveal transition / reaction shot
scene_descriptions.clip_256: Hand covers camera lens — dramatic cut ending
scene_descriptions.clip_800: City street with palm tree and bike lane — final cycling away shot

primary.rationale: Direct search intent for free office furniture

thematic_elements: price shock — retail vs street find cost contrast
urban treasure hunting — cycling discovery narrative
good condition surprise — office chair that works perfectly
waste vs value — what people throw away still has worth
guessing game — audience engagement through price prediction
minimalism angle — why buy new when the street provides
suggested_natural_phrases: Me lo he encontrado aqui tirado en Cami Fondo
Una silla de oficina en perfecto estado
Os lo juro, funciona todo — ruedas, respaldo, altura
La gente tira cosas que flipas
Yo por la calle encuentro de todo
Mirad lo que me acabo de encontrar
Esto no tiene ni un rasguno

format_specific.hook_angle: Price mystery — office chair worth XXX euros just sitting on the sidewalk
format_specific.price_reveal_strategy: Research retail price of comparable office chair (80-200 EUR range typical), reveal with text overlay
format_specific.cta_approach: ENGAGEMENT — ask viewers to guess the price before reveal
format_specific.algorithm_signal: Price shock + guessing game + short format = high comment velocity + replays

givore_mention_guideline: STREET_FINDS pillar = core recycling content. Givore mention natural and expected. Can integrate organically: 'Lo subo a Givore por si alguien lo necesita' or similar. Not forced — fits the discovery narrative.
